About
AI Phone Answering
Answers calls instantly, books appointments, and handles enquiries 24/7.
AI Email Responder
Answers calls instantly, books appointments, and handles enquiries 24/7.
AI Text Messaging
Sends texts, follow-ups, and reminders to customers.
Smart Scheduling
Optimises job scheduling, reduces conflicts, and improves efficiency.
AI Chatbot
Engages website visitors, answers FAQs, and captures leads.
Customer CRM
Stores customer details, tracks interactions, and manages communications.
Jobs Manager
Creates, assigns, and tracks jobs with updates.
Train Sophiie
Customises Sophiie's responses to suit your business.
Invoicing
Easily create, send, and track invoices to get paid faster.
Quoting
Captures job enquiries, books appointments, and manages scheduling.
Electricians
Manages incoming calls, job enquiries, and scheduling for electrical work.
Plumbers
Handles emergency calls, books services, and keeps job details organised.
HVAC
Handles heating and cooling enquiries, books services, and reduces no-shows.
